caption: A man with a shaved head, a beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recorded in a studio setting against a black sound-absorbing foam wall. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt. A silver professional microphone, mounted on a boom arm labeled "rode" and "NT1", is positioned directly in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. He begins with his right hand raised high and open, then transitions to a more expressive facial expression with his mouth open as his hand moves downward. In the final sequence, he lowers his right hand toward the bottom of the frame while continuing to speak, his expression remaining animated. The camera angle remains a static medium close-up throughout the entire clip.
